meaning: n.(=disc) 磁盘,磁碟片,圆板,圆盘,圆盘状物
examples: My computer can't read the disk you sent.
The text on the disk seems to be corrupt.
The disk will corrupt if it is overloaded.
She owned an Aiwa mini disk player, which, she told me, used a special lithium-ion battery.
Cable companies, racing to keep up, are installing a TiVo-like disk into their set-top boxes.
